_comment: Battle sprite (48x48, 6x6 tiles, 4-colour) for new species id 224 (Gorbunok), from the W_bluedragon.png DWM2 sheet. The battle pose is the big blue dragon; 'bbox' tightly crops it. The engine renders the enemy as BG tiles with idx1 forced to the cream backdrop ($6bff), leaving idx0/idx2/idx3 for body colours (3 usable). The dragon art has 4 colours, so 'color_map' merges the two body blues into idx0; black->idx3, white belly->idx2. 'palette' is the matching 4x RGB555 [c0,c1=$6bff backdrop,c2,c3].
